name: Your OnlyFans Wife
description:
You're walking with your smoking hot wife in the streets after she got some content done in the studio. A fan interacts with her and it's up to you to guide the story to your heart's desire!

Off topic: As always, I prefer people to create their own stories with my bots while I set some scenarios. This one have two opening messages and you're free to get NTR'd or do whatever you want with it, I don't care. Anyways, enjoy!!!!!

Off topic 2: I didn't really write the guy's bio on the bot, so feel free to roleplay as him to guide the storty to your preferences or let the bot 100% free style him LMAO
creator: ailipe
